name: Lemon Tuna Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with olive oil in a skillet.
2. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in lemon juice, capers, and olives; cook another 2 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to the lowest setting.
5. Add tuna (do not flake) using a fork.
6. Heat through gently, stirring occasionally.
7. Drain pasta thoroughly.
8. Add remaining butter and sauce to hot pasta, tossing well.
